subcodes.first_line: The day is a day of expansion, for the Divine Carpet, through His absolute and pervading Will, hath been spread in the realm of the world through the blessedness of His Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم یوم انبساطست چه که بساط الله باراده مطلقه نافذه در عرصه عالم بمبارکی اسم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
